entry.title: IDC 89303321DEM000061 (P00020) awarded to IDAHO ENVIRONMENTAL COALITION LLC, was modified for the amount of $58,533,467.94

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Refer to Section H contract clause, H.51 TASK ORDERING PROCEDURE

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
PROCUREMENT INSTRUMENT IDENTIFIER (PIID): 89243222FEMTO02 & 89243222FEMTO03 IDAHO CLEANUP PROJECT (ICP) END STATE CONTRACT
THIS FUNDING MODIFICATION DEOBLIGATES FUNDING FROM TASK ORDER-2 AND OBLIGATES FUNDING TO TASK ORDER-3.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
